title: RecommendationReason
description:
Complete human-readable and traceable explanation for a single drug's ranking. Decomposes the ranking decision into atomic ReasonItem fragments covering evidence support, sensitivity, resistance, conflict, and rule triggers.

Produced by ExplainableEngine to enable full auditability of the ranking decision.

drug_name.description: Name of the drug this explanation refers to.

rank.description: 1-based rank position of the drug. Aligns with the rank in the corresponding DrugScore.

overall_score.description: Composite overall score (raw_score) of the drug. The same value appears in DrugScore.overall_score.

reasons.description: Ordered list of atomic explanation fragments that together justify the rank. Items are sorted by absolute score_impact descending — the most impactful reasons appear first.

ReasonItem.title: ReasonItem
ReasonItem.description: A single atomic explanation fragment for one drug's ranking. Each reason covers one facet of the scoring: evidence support, sensitivity, resistance, conflict, or a rule-based trigger.

category.description: The facet this reason belongs to. One of: evidence_support (evidence source contributions), sensitivity (drug sensitivity analysis), resistance (resistance evidence), conflict (contradictory evidence), or rule (business rule / rank context).

detail.description: Human-readable description of this reason in English. Provides context, numeric values, and interpretation for the end user.
examples: Evidence confidence score is 0.8200 (weighted score 8.25, source diversity 0.75).
Sensitivity score 0.8500 — 8/12 evidence items indicate sensitivity.
Ranked #1 — leads DrugX (#2) by 0.1234 points in overall score.

source.description: The evidence source name or rule identifier that produced this reason. Helps users trace back to the originating system component.

score_impact.description: The numeric contribution (positive or negative) of this reason to the overall score. Positive values indicate a favourable contribution; negative values indicate a penalty. A zero value means this reason is informational only.

trace_id.description: Optional UUID or reference that can be followed back to the originating evidence item or rule evaluation. Null when the reason is aggregated or derived rather than directly traceable.

reasons.detail: Evidence confidence score is 0.8200 (weighted score 8.25, source diversity 0.75).
Sensitivity score 0.8500 — 8/12 evidence items indicate sensitivity.
Ranked #1 — leads DrugX (#2) by 0.1234 points in overall score.
